label: fallback-turn
page: lessons/01-hello-model/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)

messages.content: Give me John 3:16, word for word, in the King James Version.

message.content: Thou art God's Son whom I have given to them; And if thou shouldst ask him at all, he shall not turn thee away; But that his flesh might be with us, and we may know Him as one He is. For these are my dearly beloved ones in whom I love You: All they that through the blood of Jesus Christ our Lord shall come to God—being many in number but few in spirit—because many believed—not all believing received this grace; for God so loved them that He sent His own Son into the world, That we might believe on Him and be made children of God.
